overview: This Legacy midrange archetype leverages efficient black creatures alongside white and blue utility to control the early board while scaling into a resilient late-game presence. By utilizing cards like Nethergoyf and Dauthi Voidwalker, the deck applies immediate pressure while disrupting opponent mana and resources. Moonshadow provides a flexible finisher that can swing combat or clear opposing threats. The strategy balances aggressive early plays with defensive resource management to outvalue opponents over time.
win_conditions: Trading up into a favorable board state with efficient black creatures
Using Moonshadow's combat trick to secure lethal damage or remove key blockers
Outlasting opponents through resource denial and card advantage from midrange staples

keep_criteria: Hands with Nethergoyf or Dauthi Voidwalker paired with early removal or mana acceleration
Two-card hands containing Moonshadow and a cheap creature for turn-one pressure
Balanced hands with at least two lands and a mix of creatures and interaction
mulligan_criteria: Hands lacking early plays or board presence
Mana-heavy hands with no creatures or interaction
Hands that cannot establish a turn-one or turn-two threat

early_game: Play Nethergoyf on turn one to establish board presence and disrupt opponent's land drops
Use Dauthi Voidwalker to apply pressure while forcing opponent to spend resources on removal
Prioritize land drops and early interaction to stabilize against aggressive decks
mid_game: Trade efficiently with opponent's threats while preserving Moonshadow for key moments
Leverage card advantage by playing around expected removal and board wipes
Transition to a more controlling posture by holding up black mana for interaction
late_game: Use Moonshadow to swing combat, remove problematic blockers, or secure game-ending damage
Maintain board presence with resilient creatures while cycling through resources
Apply consistent pressure until opponent runs out of answers or mana

key_cards.name: Nethergoyf
key_cards.role: Early board presence and mana disruption
key_cards.notes: Play on turn one to force opponent to answer immediately or fall behind; use its land-destruction ability to slow down ramp or control strategies.

key_cards.name: Dauthi Voidwalker
key_cards.notes: Deploy to apply pressure while forcing opponent to spend cards on removal; its enter-the-battlefield effect can disrupt graveyard-dependent strategies.

key_cards.name: Moonshadow
key_cards.notes: Hold up for combat to swing attacks, remove key blockers, or deal direct damage; use selectively to maximize tempo advantage and secure lethal.

sequencing_tips: Hold up black mana for interaction before committing creatures to combat
Play Nethergoyf before opponent's land drops to maximize disruption value
Save Moonshadow for moments when it can swing the game state or secure lethal damage

matchups.advice: Prioritize early board presence with Nethergoyf and Dauthi Voidwalker while holding up removal for their key threats.
Apply steady pressure with efficient creatures and use Moonshadow to bypass counterspells or remove problematic permanents.
Disrupt their setup with early interaction and use Moonshadow to clear key combo pieces or finish the game before they assemble.

overview_evidence.evidence_span: Archetype: Mono Black Midrange, Format: legacy, Colors: W/U/B, Signature cards: Moonshadow, Nethergoyf, Dauthi Voidwalker
